General.Name: Derichebourg
General.Description: Derichebourg SA provides environmental services to businesses, and local and municipal authorities. The company engages in the collection, management and reuse of end-of-life capital and consumer goods, production, and industrial waste; and waste collection, urban cleaning, waste collection center management, water management. It is also involved in the production and distribution of drinking water; collection and treatment of wastewater; consumer management; and treatment of xenobiotics, as well as collection and recovery of residential waste. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Paris, France.
General.Address: 119, Av. du Général Michel Bizot, Paris, France, 75579
